chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Trans. Application No.41 of 2024 (Shams-ur-Rahman and 03 others v. The State and another) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on MA No.5712/2024 2. For orders on MA No.5713/2024 3. For hearing of main case 06.05.2024 Syed Imdad Hussain Shah, advocate for the applicants ========= 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Apparently, the applicants being aggrieved of the order dated 14.3.2024 passed by learned Vth-Additional Sessions Judge Karachi South on the production of photostat copies of certain documents in evidence have sought for transfer of their case to some other Court by filing the instant application u/s 526 Cr.PC before this Court. The passing of an adverse order could hardly constitute an act of bias against the Presiding Officer justifying this Court to withdraw the case from his Court; consequently, the instant Transfer Application being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nadir
